title: Finalize execution plan and record release evidence
outOfScope: Deleting archived Work Item evidence or changing archived summaries.
Changing implementation, policy, CI, release artifacts, or publishing another version.
Removing historical plans without recording their disposition.

sources.reason: Plan being closed and marked historical.
Published release identity and source binding.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation-only closure work with append-only evidence and already-authorized release records.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized serial execution through plan cleanup, including release and branch lifecycle closure.

preReviewWarnings: Record only observed PR, merge, tag, workflow, smoke, asset, and digest evidence; do not infer provider guarantees.
Preserve archived evidence and keep the plan's final four requested items in order.
Do not describe governance records as enterprise compliance, trusted identity, immutable audit, or sandbox guarantees.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record checkpoints before editing and before closure to prevent plan/evidence drift.

acceptance: The execution plan is marked historical/completed and retains all WI01-WI15 goals plus the serial full-lifecycle loop.
The final requested items remain: delusion testing, existing-document alignment, new release, and execution-plan cleanup.
The plan records actual WI01-WI15 PR/closure evidence and v0.5.35 provider evidence: PR 186, tag target, workflow 29859327137, strict smoke 29859350164, and published asset digests.
The plan index is aligned without deleting archived Work Item evidence or changing archived summaries.
Documentation metadata, complexity budget, AI governance checks, project quality checks, and status consistency pass.
guidelines: Use source-bound factual wording and label unavailable evidence not_run.
Keep archived Work Item records append-only and preserve user authorization evidence.
Do not introduce public APIs or implementation changes in this Work Item.

intent.problem: The approved Bootstrap Adoption review remediation plan has completed its serial Work Items and needs a final historical disposition with release evidence and no loss of audit records.
constraints: Every Work Item must have completed the governed branch/PR/merge/close lifecycle.
This Work Item may modify only the declared plan/index and governance evidence paths.
intent.rationale: A concise historical ledger makes the completed workflow, release provenance, and retention decisions discoverable without pretending that the plan itself is an enterprise security proof.

rawUserRequest: 先走完当前文档的流程。用户已授权按计划逐工单执行，包含修改代码、测试、文档、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、分支清理；妄想测试失败继续修改。

declaredIntent.summary: Complete the current execution plan serially and close its final documentation cleanup Work Item.

evidence: Archive index and manifests record merged PRs, closure, branch deletion, and base synchronization.
Published tag/release, workflow 29859327137, strict smoke 29859350164, and asset digests were inspected.
The scoped plan and index are the declared documentation closure sources.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized plan cleanup, documentation alignment, release publication, PR/merge, archive, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert the WI15 documentation diff; archived Work Item evidence and published release assets remain unchanged.
